name: Milk Orchid
description: A creamy, lactonic floral gourmand built around fig milk and vanilla orchid. Soft, comforting, and skin-close.

name: Fairy Dust
description: A dreamy gourmand blending tropical mango and coconut water with creamy vanilla and soft woody warmth.

name: Marshmelt
description: A pure, pillowy gourmand of toasted marshmallow, smooth vanilla, and a whisper of sugar. Simple, cosy, and irresistible.

name: You Rêve
description: A lush, dreamy gourmand skin-scent enhancer opening with rich buttercream and settling into plum, toasted almond, and warm musk.

name: You
description: A warm, musky skin-scent enhancer with sparkling pink pepper and earthy iris that adapts to the wearer's skin chemistry.

name: Donna Born in Roma Extradose
description: An ultra-intense oriental vanilla at its highest concentration. Blackcurrant opens into a smooth rum accord with a deeply addictive vanilla base.

name: Dança Mística
description: A sparkling floral inspired by the beaches of Búzios. Purple fig and champagne open into lily of the valley and orris, settling into a warm vanilla sandalwood base.

name: Father Figure
description: A vivid green fragrance rooted in lushness. Fleshy fig and dewy cassis open into creamy sandalwood, orris root, and vanilla Madagascar with sheer patchouli intimacy.

name: Beach Skin
description: A fresh, solar body mist evoking sun-warmed skin after a day at the beach. Tiare blossom and salty bergamot melt into coconut milk and creamy sandalwood.

name: Goddess
description: A gourmand aromatic fragrance built around a powerful trio of vanillas. Rich vanilla caviar with soft lavender creates a sophisticated comfort in a bottle.

name: Soie Malaquais
description: A silken, sophisticated gourmand inspired by silk gowns on the Quai Malaquais in Paris. Bergamot and blackcurrant weave into rose and a warm chestnut and cocoa base.

name: Hundred Silent Ways
description: A warm, elegant floral oriental with a cotton candy softness. Tuberose and peach open into a jasmine and gardenia heart, settling into vanilla and sandalwood.

name: Fakhama
description: An oriental floral inspired by Kilian Love Don't Be Shy. Gourmand top notes with orange flower give way to vanilla and white florals on a clean musk base.

name: Yum Boujee Marshmallow 81
description: A luxuriously fluffy pink gourmand. Freesia and juicy apple open into marshmallow and strawberry, drying down to whipped vanilla and soft musk.

name: This is Her
description: A soft, smooth woody musky floral with pink pepper and jasmine. Versatile, clean, and effortlessly wearable.

name: Fire at Will
description: An ethereal, refined vanilla gourmand built around a luminous mimosa and vanilla duo. Elegant rather than sweet, with amber and vetiver grounding the soft core.

name: By the Fireplace
description: A warm, smoky evocation of a crackling winter fire. Roasted chestnut and pink pepper over guaiac wood and clove, sweetened with vanilla and cashmeran.
